news.summary: More than 40 counterfeit extensions resembling popular crypto wallets for Firefox have been identified in a recent scheme aimed at stealing users' wallet credentials.
news.headline: Over 40 counterfeit Firefox extensions mimicking crypto wallets used to scam users in ongoing theft.
In June, Russia's oil revenue hit a two-year low due to declining global crude prices and a stronger ruble, reducing the ruble value of each barrel for the Kremlin.

news.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Limited revealed a proposed exchangeable bond offering today, pertaining to the ordinary shares of Alibaba Health Information Technology Limited listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (HKEX: 00241). The company intends to issue bonds that can be exchanged for Alibaba Health shares. The offering is aimed at raising funds and expanding investments in the health sector. Alibaba is listed on NYSE as BABA, HKEX as 9988 (HKD Counter) and 89988 (RMB Counter). The Bond Offering's success will depend on market conditions and regulatory approvals.
news.headline: Alibaba proposes offering HK$12 billion zero coupon exchangeable bonds, tied to Alibaba Health shares.

news.summary: In London on July 3, 2025, PharmaVentures welcomed Samara Ferguson as the new Vice President to head its Pricing and Market Access sector. Ferguson's role entails overseeing sell-side, buy-side, and licensing due diligence, as well as facilitating deal-making for companies. With over two decades of experience, her appointment brings a wealth of knowledge to the division, benefiting various stakeholders involved.
news.headline: PharmaVentures appoints Samara Ferguson as VP for Pricing and Market Access, leading division on due diligence and deal-making.

news.summary: Philip Morris International's U.S. businesses (PMI U.S.) launched the "Invested in America" advertising campaign in Stamford, Connecticut. The campaign showcases the company's dedication and increased investment in the U.S., emphasizing job creation and manufacturing revitalization. PMI U.S. aims to enhance public health by providing smoking adults aged 21+ with alternative options and supporting local communities. This initiative highlights PMI U.S.'s efforts in driving economic growth and fostering positive change in America.
news.headline: Philip Morris International launches "Invested in America" campaign, highlighting contributions to US, including job growth and manufacturing. #PMIUSA

news.summary: In Shanghai on July 3, 2025, Envision Energy, a prominent player in eco-friendly technology, achieved a major milestone by concluding a significant large-scale fire test for its intelligent energy storage system. This accomplishment sets new standards for safety, environmental sustainability, and system durability. The test results indicate a significant advancement in ensuring the reliability and safety of energy storage systems at a mass scale, reinforcing Envision Energy's commitment to cutting-edge solutions for a greener future.
news.headline: Envision Energy sets new record with 49-hour fire test on smart energy storage system, enhancing safety standards.

news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec on July 03, 2025, Azimut Exploration Inc. (TSXV: AZM) (OTCQX: AZMTF) has signed a definitive purchase and sale agreement with Dios Exploration Inc. to buy Dios' K2 Property located next to the Elmer Property in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region of Quebec, Canada. The Property is in a significant mining area, as shown in Figures 1 to 3.
news.headline: Azimut acquires K2 Property adjacent to Elmer Property in Quebec, Canada; purchase agreement with Dios Exploration Inc.

news.summary: In Hangzhou, China on July 3, 2025, Yunji Inc. disclosed that Mr. Yeqing Cui has stepped down from his role as Senior Financial Director and finance head at the company. Yunji, listed as YJ on NASDAQ, is a prominent membership-centered social e-commerce platform. This change in leadership comes amidst personal reasons cited by Mr. Cui.
news.headline: Yunji Inc. announces resignation of Senior Financial Director Mr. Yeqing Cui from leading e-commerce platform.

news.summary: A collaborative initiative with Common Purpose has resulted in a four-day program set to take place in London from July 3, 2025. American Express has revealed that Jonathan Anderson, renowned creative director, will headline the event, which will cater to nonprofit leaders representing 24 countries. The diverse program includes engaging sessions and activities tailored to the needs of participants.
news.headline: American Express partners with Common Purpose for a 4-day program in London with Dior's Jonathan Anderson for nonprofit leaders from 24 countries.

news.summary: A company listed on TSXV under the ticker symbol ESBL is pushing forward its expansion plans in North America through the acquisition of a new entity and the establishment of a formal investor relations program. Eshbal Functional Food Inc., known as Eshbal, is focusing on gluten-free and health-conscious food products. This move was initiated on July 3, 2025, in Vancouver, BC. The company's growth strategy includes increasing its presence in North America and the recent acquisition is a key step in this direction. This development signifies a significant milestone for ESBL and highlights its commitment to growth and development in the region.
news.headline: Eshbal Functional Food Inc. (TSXV: ESBL) signs agreement for North American expansion with new acquisition and investor relations program.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a new report on the Water-based Barrier Coatings Market was released. This report delves into various components of the market, including water, filler, binder, and additives. It focuses on barrier types such as water vapor and oil/grease, with a particular emphasis on substrates like paper and cardboard. The report highlights the prominence of the food and beverage packaging sector in this market. Covering global data, the report provides insights into key regions influencing this market segment.
news.headline: Water-based barrier coatings market to reach $1.85 billion by 2030, exclusive report reveals.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) announced that it will unveil its second quarter 2025 financial figures before the market opens on August 6, 2025. The company is set to hold a conference call at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the earnings report and strategic corporate plans.
news.headline: Parsons Corp (NYSE: PSN) to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 6, 2025 before markets open; conference call at 8:00 am EST.

news.summary: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has not approved subsidies for crypto power yet. However, Pakistan is collaborating with the World Bank and other entities to enhance the plan.
news.headline: IMF denies Pakistan's request to subsidize power for crypto mining. Pakistan seeks support from World Bank for revised proposal.

news.summary: In Toronto on July 3, 2025, Rock Tech Lithium Inc. (TSXV: RCK) (OTCQX: RCKTF) (FWB: RJIB) (WKN: A1XF0V) announced the successful completion of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. Key details from the meeting were shared, including important numbers and outcomes.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC, 03 July 2025 - Marimaca Copper Corp. (TSX:MARI, ASX:MC2) has announced significant discoveries in sediment-hosted copper sulphide and oxide intersections, expanding the Pampa Medina deposit. Located about 28km east of the Marimaca Oxide Deposit in the Atacama Desert, drilling efforts have revealed high-grade copper mineralization in various forms like bornite-chalcopyrite. These findings mark a substantial extension of the deposit in all directions and showcase the potential of the regionally extensive sedimentary rock system hosting the Pampa Medina deposit in the flat "pampa" valley at low altitude.
news.headline: Marimaca Copper drills Pampa Medina Sulphides: 6m of 12.0% Cu & 26m of 4.1% Cu in SMRD-13, 40m of 2.1% Cu in SMD-02. Extensions found in Atacama Desert.

news.summary: According to reports, JD.com and Ant Group are seeking to persuade Chinese regulators to introduce stablecoins based on the yuan in order to enhance the currency's global prominence and compete with stablecoins tied to the US dollar.
news.headline: JD.com and Ant Group seek to introduce yuan stablecoins to combat US dollar's dominance in global market.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, MOTE Therapeutics, a biotech company in its early stages, unveiled MaryJane Rafii, PhD, MBA, as the new Chief Investment and Business Officer. This decision coincides with MOTE's intensified work on targeted RNA delivery solutions.
news.headline: MaryJane Rafii named Chief Investment & Business Officer at MOTE Therapeutics to drive global growth of RNA delivery platform.

news.summary: Oslo, July 3, 2025: Following approval from the General Meeting on April 29, 2025, Zelluna ASA's Board of Directors (ticker “ZLNA” on OSE) has decided to grant new shares as part of a long-term incentive program. This resolution allows for the issuance of share options to all employees within the company.
news.headline: Zelluna ASA to issue share options to all employees as part of long-term incentive program approved by General Meeting.

news.summary: In Germany, a new compound called AC102 has shown promising results in treating tinnitus in a preclinical study. Administered in a single dose, AC102 almost completely reversed tinnitus and repaired damaged connections between the auditory nerve and inner ear cells. The study, conducted by Erlangen University Hospital and Berlin's AudioCure, was published in the International Journal of Molecular Sciences. This breakthrough could potentially offer a solution to the  debilitating condition of tinnitus, impacting millions worldwide.
news.headline: New compound AC102 reverses tinnitus in preclinical model with single dose, restoring damaged connections between auditory nerve and inner ear sensory cells.
